context: W5.2 baidu RE-TEST. #1321 verdict FAIL is NOT a W5.2 regression (confirmed by dev supervisor via engine log): at 00:44 the engine blocked baidu correctly — [APF:url_query_blocked] keyword=주민등록번호, [APF:block] response_type=baidu_sse_v6_keepalive, block_response size=1116. baidu's block path (baidu_sse_v6_keepalive DB template) is UNTOUCHED by W5.2 (which only migrated m365_signalr to emit_ws_envelope). The #1321 blank-conversation (no 차단 rendered) is a client-side SSE render transient (baidu frontend did not render the engine's block this run), analogous to m365 SignalR fragility (#1290→#1298 retry rendered). This re-test confirms baidu renders the 차단 warning on retry.
notes: GUI method, chat.baidu.com. Submit the PII prompt, wait for the conversation/answer area; baidu_sse_v6_keepalive block should render the Korean 차단 warning. PASS = '차단' rendered. If blank again, hard-reload once and re-check (SSE render can be slow). engine block already confirmed correct (size=1116) — this is confirming client render only.
